prompt: Vertical portrait 9:16 high-resolution atlas world map for a Deadlands-inspired Weird West supernatural frontier setting. Terrain type: continent_archipelago. Draw one dominant Weird West frontier continent plus a large irregular offshore archipelago inspired by a flooded Great Maze. Mainland: boom towns, rail stations, frontier forts, ghost rock mine claims, cattle trails, desert badlands, haunted canyons, mad science laboratories, cursed graveyards, spirit lands, river deltas, ghost swamps, snowy ranges, prairie plains, and Reckoning-scarred wastelands. Archipelago: uneven island groups with flooded canyon islands, ghost-rock mining islands, outlaw coves, rail ferry towns, haunted lighthouse rocks, boomtown ports, sea caves, spirit shrine islands, steamship wrecks, and black reef chains. Avoid simple vertical split; separate continent and archipelago with a diagonal / C-shaped gulf, twisting straits, shoals, reefs, maze channels, and narrow passages. Complex realistic coastlines with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, deltas, fjords, lagoons, barrier islands, reefs, sea caves. Include arid mesas, red deserts, salt flats, volcanic basins, pine forests, storm coasts, flooded maze canyons, and cold mountains. Sepia frontier cartography, ghost-rock green glow, no readable labels, no text, no logos, no satellite style.
